name: myaider
label: MyAider MCP
description: Connects OpenClaw to the MyAider MCP server (myaider.ai), registers the myaider_mcp agent tool, and provides skills for MCP access and dynamic skill import/upgrade.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the MyAider MCP plugin

url.description: Your MyAider MCP server URL. Obtain it from https://www.myaider.ai/mcp
